0000-0002-3522-3592.biography: I was born in Dongguan, China, after spending eighteen years of my life there, I was admitted to University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (UESTC, 电子科技大学) when I was 18 years old. Thereafter, I’ve spent three years at the Innovation Center of UESTC, discovering my research interest with Prof. Liang-Jian Deng. On 2022, I was admitted to the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST, 香港科技大學) under Dr. Hao Chen’s supervise in the HKUST SMART (Scalable Medical Analysis, Reasoning and Treatment) Group. Now I am focusing on Medical Image Analysis.
